description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The Capital.com REST API provides programmatic access to the Capital.com trading engine, including positions, working orders, deal confirmations, account information, account switching, transaction history, account preferences (leverage, hedging mode), market navigation, instruments, and historical price data. Authentication uses an API key plus login credentials to create a session that returns CST and X-SECURITY-TOKEN headers, which expire after ten minutes of inactivity.

Contact Support:
